subject: What’s a money model?
body:
What's a Money Model?

A Money Model is a series of offers deliberately structured to generate the most cash up front, get the most leads, and get your highest customer lifetime value. Period.

In simpler terms it attracts more customers, gets them to spend more money, faster, over and over again.

It capitalizes on the scientific principles of volume, intensity, latency, frequency–but weaponised for growing a business.

A proper Money Models includes four parts:

- Attraction Offers: to get the most leads

- Upsell Offers: to get more money from them faster

- Downsell Offers: to turn a "no" into a "yes"  (even more sales)

- Continuity Offers: to keep them buying again and again

It took me years to realize this - but every super successful business I've owned had all four parts perfectly sequenced. The ones that didn't, weren't super successful, and they were like most businesses…

Most businesses putter along with only 1 or 2 parts - but - the magic happens when you combine all the parts together.

With a properly designed Money Model…your business attracts the maximum amount of customers, maximizes profit and cash flow so you can outspend the competition, and builds stability in volatile markets with recurring revenue.

And the best part, the Money Models in my new book work for any business, in any industry, of any size.

I've been waiting for 6 years to unleash the insane power of Money Models - and the time has finally come.

$100M Money Models is coming out on August 16th, 2025.

So if you enjoyed $100M Offers, $100M Leads... or any of my free content, courses, or books I've put out over the last few years, this is definitely for you:

- Register here free
- And if you wanna win absurd prizes, refer friends for free.

Thank you again, Alex

PS - for those of you wondering about my huge secret giveaway can't tell you what it is yet, but I can tell you that it's better than an NFT and less than a Bitcoin and every single person gets one (who shows up live).

PPS - Remember, to get my Secret Giveaway you have to:

1) Register 2) Show up live. That's it.
